app.name: Tetea Africa
app.description: AI-powered civic intelligence platform for Africa

notifications.channelTitle: How would you like to be notified?

deadlines.title: My Deadlines
deadlines.pageDescription: Track deadlines from government documents you've analysed.
deadlines.empty: No deadlines tracked yet. Analyse a document to get started.
deadlines.reminders: Reminders at 7, 3 and 1 day before due date

feed.title: Your Feed
feed.pageDescription: Government documents that affect your rights, sorted by urgency.
feed.unauthTitle: What's happening in Kenya right now
feed.unauthSubtext: We read government documents so you don't have to — and show you what you can do about them.
feed.noSubscription: You have no active subscriptions. Set one up to see matching documents.
feed.noDocuments: No matching documents yet. We'll notify you when something new arrives.
feed.processingEmpty: Documents are being processed. Check back in a few minutes.
feed.personalizeHint: Set your region and topics to see documents relevant to you.
feed.locationBanner: See documents relevant to your area
feed.searchPlaceholder: Search by topic, county, or keyword...
feed.noResults: No documents match your filters. Try broadening your search.
feed.signInBanner: Sign in to get notified when documents affect your area — free forever.

urgency.canAct: You can take action on this
